5-terms.title: All successful crypto traders already know these
5-terms.subtitle: Understanding professional crypto traders can be hard, especially for a newcomer. Today we explain 5 basic cryptocurrency terms you simply have to know.
5-terms.item-1-text: a person with an absurd amount of crypto
5-terms.item-3-text: total value of a particular cryptocurrency (or all of them)
5-terms.item-4-text: conventional currencies, say, USD or JPY
5-terms.item-5-text: a typo that was originally supposed to convince crypto enthusiasts to hold their bitcoins
5-terms.bot-text:
